ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debugging in console logs. Useful for troubleshooting and development.
ast.target: 在控制台日志中启用调试。适用于故障排除和开发。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if all dependencies are installed and if it can works correctly with your current settings to communicate with Vikunja. If there is only one Notice, everything is fine. If there are more, please enable debugging and check the console for more information.
ast.target: 检查所有依赖项是否已安装，以及它是否能在当前设置下正常工作以与 Vikunja 通信。如果只有一条通知，则一切正常。如果有更多通知，请启用调试并检查控制台以获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the cron job to sync tasks automatically. If disabled, you have to trigger the sync manually via command.
ast.target: 启用定时任务以自动同步任务。如果禁用，您必须通过命令手动触发同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the cache will be written to disk immediately after a change. If disabled, the cache will be written to disk after a certain interval. If you experience performance issues, you should disable this and use a frequency.
ast.target: 如果启用，缓存将在更改后立即写入磁盘。如果禁用，缓存将在一定间隔后写入磁盘。如果您遇到性能问题，应禁用此选项并使用频率设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 连接到 Vikunja 的设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 设置您的 Vikunja 访问令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This plugin prioritizes changes in Obsidian over Vikunja. This means, that if you make changes in both systems, the changes in Obsidian will be used over the one in Vikunja. To prevent data loss, do not make any changes in your markdown files without Obsidian.
ast.target: 此插件优先处理 Obsidian 中的更改，而非 Vikunja。这意味着，如果您在两个系统中都进行了更改，Obsidian 中的更改将优先于 Vikunja 中的更改。为防止数据丢失，请勿在 Obsidian 之外修改您的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will check for changes in Vault and Vikunja and update the tasks vice versa, but prioritize the changes in Obsidian. Useful, if you want to use Vikunja, but do not make any changes directly on the markdown files while obsidian is closed.
ast.target: 此操作将检查 Vault 和 Vikunja 中的更改并双向更新任务，但优先处理 Obsidian 中的更改。如果您想使用 Vikunja，但不想在 Obsidian 关闭时直接修改 Markdown 文件，此功能将非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This project will be used to place new tasks created by this plugin.
ast.target: 此项目将用于存放由本插件创建的新任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Because vikunja does not move done tasks to the correct bucket, you have to select the bucket where the done tasks are placed, so this plugin can do it for you.
ast.target: 由于 Vikunja 不会将已完成的任务移动到正确的桶中，您需要选择一个桶来存放已完成的任务，以便本插件可以为您完成此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will move all tasks from Vault to the selected default project in Vikunja. This will not delete any tasks in Vikunja, but only move them to the selected project. This helps, if you make a wrong decision in the past. This does not create any tasks in Vikunja.
ast.target: 此操作将把 Vault 中的所有任务移动到 Vikunja 中选定的默认项目。这不会删除 Vikunja 中的任何任务，只会将它们移动到选定的项目中。如果您过去做出了错误的决定，这会很有帮助。此操作不会在 Vikunja 中创建任何任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append tasks to the daily note at the bottom.
ast.target: 将任务追加到每日笔记的末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert tasks after the given string. The plugin will search in current daily note for the string and insert tasks after it.
ast.target: 在给定的字符串后插入任务。插件将在当前每日笔记中搜索该字符串，并在其后插入任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to use tags in text. This will add tags to the task description instead of removing them. They will be used as tags nevertheless.
ast.target: 启用此选项以在文本中使用标签。这会将标签添加到任务描述中，而不是移除它们。它们仍将被用作标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add tags that should be ignored when using tags in text. Tags added here will not be converted to text when pushed to vikunja. Comma separated.
ast.target: 添加在文本中使用标签时应忽略的标签。此处添加的标签在推送到 Vikunja 时不会被转换为文本。请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If labels not found in the vault, they will be deleted in Vikunja. Mostly, because you delete them. Very helpful, if you only create labels through Obsidian.
ast.target: 如果在 Vault 中未找到标签，它们将在 Vikunja 中被删除。这通常是因为您删除了它们。如果您仅通过 Obsidian 创建标签，此功能将非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If tasks not found in the vault, they will be deleted in Vikunja. Mostly, because you delete them. Very helpful, if you only create tasks through Obsidian.
ast.target: 如果在 Vault 中未找到任务，它们将在 Vikunja 中被删除。这通常是因为您删除了它们。如果您仅通过 Obsidian 创建任务，此功能将非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, only tasks in the default project will be removed when ID not found in Vault. Otherwise, all tasks will be removed nevertheless the configured project.
ast.target: 如果启用，仅当在 Vault 中未找到 ID 时，才会删除默认项目中的任务。否则，无论配置的项目如何，所有任务都将被删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please wait until the projects are loaded. If this message still there after a few seconds, please check your Vikunja Host and Access Token. Enable debugging and check the console for more information.
ast.target: 请等待项目加载完成。如果几秒后此消息仍然存在，请检查您的 Vikunja 主机和访问令牌。启用调试并在控制台中查看更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will check for changes on cursors last line in Vault, too. Useful, if you want to reduce the load on your system and faster updates.
ast.target: 此操作也会检查 Vault 中光标所在行的更改。如果您想减少系统负载并加快更新速度，此功能将非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will create a task in Vikunja, if you move the cursor and the found task on last line was not synced to Vikunja. Useful, if you want to create a task quickly and do not want to sync manually.
ast.target: 如果您移动光标且在最后一行找到的任务尚未同步到 Vikunja，此操作将在 Vikunja 中创建一个任务。如果您想快速创建任务且不想手动同步，此功能将非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will update the completed status of tasks immediately to Vikunja.
ast.target: 此操作将立即将任务的完成状态更新到 Vikunja。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Could not find any files in the vault! Please create a file first.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：在 Vault 中未找到任何文件！请先创建一个文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Found problems in plugin. Have to be fixed first. Syncing is stopped.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：发现插件存在问题。必须先修复。同步已停止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Output file is not selected. Please select a file to use File as output.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：未选择输出文件。请选择一个文件以使用文件作为输出。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Output file not found. Please select a valid file to use File as output.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：未找到输出文件。请选择一个有效的文件以使用文件作为输出。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Obsidian Dataview plugin is not loaded. Please install Obsidian Dataview plugin to use Dataview.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：Obsidian Dataview 插件未加载。请安装 Obsidian Dataview 插件以使用 Dataview。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Not sufficient permissions for Vikunja API. Please check the permissions in Vikunja Settings and create a new token.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：Vikunja API 权限不足。请检查 Vikunja 设置中的权限并创建一个新令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: No views found. Please configure the plugin before using it.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：未找到视图。请在使用前配置插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vikunja Plugin: Found problems. Please fix them in settings before using the plugin.
ast.target: Vikunja 插件：发现问题。请在使用插件前在设置中修复它们。
